'''Yhuli Docking Port 32''' was a structure<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref> located in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Yhuli system/Legends|Yhuli system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Jospro sector/Legends|Jospro sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Tiss'shar]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Kal-tan-shi]] captured [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[General/Legends|generals]] [[Tfin]] and [[Wuvnir]] at Yhuli Docking Port 32.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yhuli Docking Port 32 was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" />
